summary: A single test in DbVersionTest.testCollectionVersion failed with an assertion error: an owner entity's version was incorrectly incremented when the test expected it to remain unchanged during a collection operation.
root_cause: The test assertion failed because the owner entity's version property was incremented (actual: true) when it should have remained unchanged (expected: false), indicating a logic bug in the collection version-tracking mechanism.

evidence.quote: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: owner version not incremented ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>
evidence.reason: Direct assertion failure showing the owner version was incremented when the test expected it to remain unchanged
Confirms isolation of failure to a single test, ruling out widespread systematic issues
Gradle test task failed due to the test assertion failure
Stack trace identifies the exact test method and line number where the assertion failed

suggested_fix: Debug the version-tracking logic in collection owner entity handling to understand why the version is being incremented when it should remain unchanged. Review recent changes to collection handling or versioning mechanisms in hibernate-core.
